title: tournefortia obtusiflora
intro: Tournefortia obtusiflora, also known as the "Tournefortia" or "Sneezeweed", is a flowering plant species native to Central America and the Caribbean. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tournefortia obtusiflora include its ability to treat respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Tournefortia obtusiflora include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
